# Umain Arena

> Free browser FPS (desktop): a CS 1.6-style sniper arena (`awp_map`)
> pitting the Designers vs Developers teams, with 8 original characters,
> bots, rounds and a scoreboard. A fun, lighthearted shootout — no gore,
> no real people. Not affiliated with Valve.

## How to play

- Open the site in a desktop browser (Chrome/Edge/Firefox). No install.
- Choose a nick, a team (Designers or Developers) and a character.
- WASD moves, mouse aims, left click shoots, right click opens the AWP
  Sniper scope, Ctrl crouches (steadier aim), Shift sprints, Space jumps, R
  reloads, 1/2/3 switch AWP Sniper/Pistol/Knife, Z/X/C voice commands, Tab scoreboard.
- Rules: 4v4 with respawn, 1:39 rounds; more kills wins the round; 3
  rounds win the match. Multikills have Unreal Tournament-style announcements.

## Frequently asked questions

- Is it free? Yes, 100%, runs in the browser.
- Do I need to install it? No — it's a static site.
- Does it work on mobile? Desktop is recommended (mouse + keyboard).
- Is it an official Valve/Counter-Strike game? No. Independent parody.
- Are the characters real people? No — fictional archetypes.

## Technology

- Three.js (WebGL), no build step, 100% procedural assets (canvas textures,
  low-poly models in code, synthesized SFX + optional audio pack).
- Open source (MIT) except the audio folder.

## Links

- Site: https://umain-arena.vercel.app/
- Code: https://github.com/jacksonfdam/umain-arena
- Based on: https://github.com/rubenmarcus/csbrasil (CS BRASIL: Treta Suprema)
